title: Verification, binary smoke, dedupe behavior verification

test_e2e_preservation.expected: All test_e2e_* in tldr-core/security/vuln.rs remain GREEN
test_e2e_preservation.observed: All test_e2e_* GREEN — no regression in tldr-core (modulo pre-existing ruby_io_popen test which fails at HEAD too — see notes)

fp_regression_guards_stay_green.observed: All 4 GREEN; binary smoke shows 0 findings on each FP fixture

non_rust_dispatch_sanity.observed: Python XSS test was failing at HEAD (verified via HEAD-restore experiment) and continues to fail post-M2 — pre-existing gap, NOT an M2 regression

dedupe_verification_a2_a3.fixture_1_collapse: MET — line-scanner CommandInjection at line 6 dropped (canonical preserved)
dedupe_verification_a2_a3.fixture_2_multi_line_chain: ACKNOWLEDGED LIMITATION — neither layer emits in the constructed chain; dedupe predicate has no work to do
dedupe_verification_a2_a3.fixture_3_different_vuln_same_line: MET — UnsafeCode + CommandInjection both preserved (predicate filters by vuln_type)

wildcard_get_fp_quantification_a2.synthetic_fp_rate_on_get_callers: 100% (3/3 — HashMap::get, Vec::get, BTreeMap::get all emit Ssrf)

ruby_io_popen_with_user_input_via_comput.rationale: Test added in `field_access_info-v1 M1` (commit 49ed30c) as a planned RED integration test awaiting closure in that sibling milestone. M2 did NOT modify Ruby surface (taint.rs diff is RUST_AST_SINKS HttpRequest only).

test_vuln_detects_xss_python.rationale: Verified pre-existing via HEAD-restore experiment: built `git show HEAD:vuln.rs` version of the binary, ran on the same Python XSS fixture, observed 0 XSS findings (matches post-M2 behavior). The XSS detection has a pre-existing gap on `f-string` HTML interpolation in Flask handlers, predating this milestone.
test_vuln_detects_xss_python.carry_forward: Separate Python XSS bank/sanitizer milestone (out of scope)

test_similar_on_*_in_exhaustive_matrix.rationale: Embedding-cache integration tests (semantic-search feature). Use `#[serial(embedding_cache)]` and require fastembed model cache. Orthogonal to vuln dispatch.
test_similar_on_*_in_exhaustive_matrix.carry_forward: Embedding cache infrastructure milestone (out of scope)

loc_delta_source.crates/tldr-cli/src/commands/remaining/v: +56 -25 lines (analyze_file rewrite to dual-dispatch + new dedupe_overlap helper + doc-comment update)

metrics.atomic_commit_boundary_satisfied: YES — single commit ships dispatch flip + dedupe + SSRF bank patch + doc-comment update (M2 atomic_dispatch_commit mandate)

carry_forward_for_followons: rust-wildcard-get-narrowing-v1: tighten ('*', 'get') and ('*', 'post') wildcard patterns to receiver-type-aware (only fire when receiver is reqwest::Client / reqwest::blocking::Client / ureq::Agent / ureq::Request). FP rate on synthetic patterns: 100% (3/3) on non-HTTP-client .get(<tainted>) callers. Real-world impact unmeasured but expected HIGH.

rust-panic-suppression-v1: gate Panic emission behind --include-smells flag, default-suppress on user codebases. Premortem E3 sub-elephant: is_rust_test_file at vuln.rs:679-685 suppresses Panic on /tests/ paths but production code paths (typical src/main.rs, src/lib.rs) get every .unwrap() flagged. UX noise on real-world Rust codebases.
Python XSS f-string Flask handler bank coverage (separate milestone)
